lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant cosmetic damage and the interior shows heavy wear. Multiple mechanical issues are present and will require repair.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows noticeable wear. All mechanical systems are operational but will require maintenance soon.

This is a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable and well-maintained vehicle that’s ready for your next adventure! It’s in great shape overall, showing some light, honest wear that reflects its history of dependable service. You'll love the smooth ride and the clean, comfortable interior. It’s a solid car that has been consistently cared for and is ready to hit the road today!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine is difficult to start and produces significant smoke when running, indicating serious internal issues. The transmission shifts roughly, and there are noticeable fluid leaks underneath. Cosmetically, the body has significant rust and several large dents, while the interior shows heavy wear and tear. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for a buyer looking for a major project or a source of parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be reliable for daily use. The engine currently runs but has a persistent knock, and the transmission exhibits slipping when shifting into higher gears. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, noticeable rust along the wheel wells, and a failing clear coat. Inside, the interior is heavily worn with tears in the fabric seats and a sagging headliner. Additionally, the air conditioning is non-functional and the rear windows do not operate. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited for a dedicated project or as a source for parts.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience, this selection represents an outstanding value for the discerning professional seeking both quality and longevity.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! 🚗 It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really solid shape—it's been well-loved and runs great. It's perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that’s ready for many more adventures. I’m sad to see it go, but I’d love for it to go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This C6 Z06 is a mechanically sound example of track-bred engineering, featuring the legendary LS7 7.0L V8 with its signature dry-sump lubrication system and titanium intake valves. The high-revving powerplant is mated to a Tremec 6-speed manual transmission, delivering visceral engagement through a limited-slip differential. Built on a weight-optimized hydroformed aluminum chassis, the vehicle maintains excellent structural rigidity and predictable suspension kinematics. Recent maintenance has focused on drivetrain longevity, ensuring the valvetrain and cooling systems are operating within peak parameters. A driver-focused machine that offers a raw, naturally aspirated experience with robust mechanical integrity.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean interior. Runs well. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive aesthetic and mechanical shape. The exterior shines with a deep luster, though it shows the expected minor stone chips from highway driving. Inside, the leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, and all electronics function exactly as they should. It drives smoothly with a responsive engine and tight suspension, benefiting from a full service history and recent oil change. It’s a reliable, premium ride that balances performance with everyday comfort.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained to rigorous standards, it exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a refined exterior profile. Every component has been inspected to ensure it meets our exacting benchmarks for quality and longevity. This is an investment in both prestige and practical utility, offering a driving experience that remains as composed as it is commanding.

This distinguished vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile. A premier selection for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has been well-maintained, so it's ready to hit the road with its next owner! Whether you're commuting or planning a road trip, this beauty will get you there comfortably. Come see it for yourself—I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday practicality. The exterior finish retains a deep luster, showing only the minor road wear expected of a car that has been consistently cared for. Inside, the cabin remains clean and inviting; the upholstery is free of major blemishes, and all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust, having undergone regular oil changes and scheduled servicing to ensure long-term reliability. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts crisply, and the tires have significant tread remaining. It is a solid, dependable choice for a buyer seeking a high-quality driving experience and a vehicle that has clearly been respected by its owner.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure continued excellence on the road. With its sophisticated profile and robust service history, this automobile stands as a testament to enduring quality and value. We invite you to experience a vehicle that exceeds standard expectations for its class.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent performance, the automobile retains its sophisticated character and structural excellence. The interior and exterior finishes reflect a history of attentive care, ensuring a premium driving experience that meets our rigorous standards for quality and reliability. We invite you to inspect this exceptional example of engineering excellence.

It’s been well-loved, runs super smoothly, and is totally ready for its next big adventure. It’s a fantastic find for anyone wanting a solid, quality vehicle without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin—I just know you’re going to love how it handles!

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been really well-loved? This beauty has served me so well and is still in great shape for its next adventure. It runs like a dream and is super clean inside and out. I’ve taken care of all the regular maintenance, so it's ready for you to just hop in and go. Perfect for road trips or just zipping around town! Come take it for a spin—I know you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 remains a benchmark of analog performance, powered by the high-revving S54B32 power plant featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for superior lateral dynamics. Mechanical upkeep is evident with a reinforced rear subframe and a recently serviced cooling system. The chassis retains its factory-spec rigidity, offering the communicative steering and balanced weight distribution synonymous with the M badge. A mechanically sound, driver-grade example of a modern classic.
Clean title. Maintenance records included. Engine runs smooth. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the ideal balance between performance and practicality. The exterior presents beautifully, featuring a lustrous finish with only the faintest evidence of highway travel. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, while every dial, button, and digital interface operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. It delivers a composed, responsive driving experience that inspires confidence on every journey. This is a reliable, high-quality car that has been cherished by its owner and is ready for its next chapter.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it demonstrates reliable mechanical health and a refined aesthetic presence. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and consistent performance.
